name: domain:archie
description: Static-publishable multi-media exhibit annotation platform: OSD + Annotorious deep-zoom image annotation, audio/video annotation, W3C WADM-compliant, IIIF Presentation 3 on disk, authored in Studio and published as static site to GitHub Pages. 6 subsystems: annotation-spine, rendering, storage, publish, studio, viewer.

name: ecosystem:archie
description: Svelte 5 + Astro + Vite toolchain, OSD/Annotorious/fflate/snarkdown/DOMPurify runtime deps, Vitest test framework, pnpm monorepo. IIIF/WADM/WebVTT standards. GitHub Pages deploy target via Contents API. Modern stratum throughout (no legacy).

name: infrastructure:archie
description: pnpm monorepo: 3 packages (render-core/mount/svelte) + 2 apps (studio/viewer). TypeScript 5650 LOC 86 files, Svelte 1478 LOC 10 files. 245 tests (Vitest). No CI yet, no linters. Single era (modern).

name: subsystems:archie
description: 6 subsystems aligned with package structure. Annotation Spine (append-only log, version-DAG merge, WADM serialization), Rendering (3-layer: core→mount→svelte), Storage (Filesystem seam + OPFS/FSA/Zip), Publish (zip primitive + GH Pages adapter), Studio (Svelte 5 authoring SPA), Viewer (Astro+Svelte static site).

name: lens-data:archie
description: Source-of-truth/thin-projection pattern recurs at every boundary: annotations (log→heads), rendering (core→adapters), storage (seam→backends), publish (zip→hosts), links (archie:URI→display URL). Three-tier interop degradation (Archie/PROV/pure-WADM). Append-only log→heads projection+history sidecar at three boundaries.
